metadata.description: Marketplace for the dreamteam meta-orchestration plugin.

plugins.name: dreamteam
plugins.description: Domain-agnostic meta-orchestration for Claude Code, Codex, Gemini & CodeWhale: a Caster-selected, cost-aware crew drives a task or approved plan to a verified result via a per-workstream produce -> gate -> fix -> integrate loop with independent review gates and a post-run learning retro.
